tracks.meaning: a planned undertaking or enterprise with defined goals, timeline, and resources
to cause something to move forward or outward, typically with force
to estimate or calculate something based on available information or assumptions
to display an image or video onto a surface using a projector or projection device
to extend a line, plane, or shape outward in a particular direction
to represent a three-dimensional surface on a two-dimensional map using mathematical transformation
to convey an impression or image of oneself to others
to thrust or propel something outward from a surface or structure
to make one's voice or stage presence clearly audible or visible to an audience
